purpose: Close two rejected BX21 proposals as duplicate canonical identities after records validation.

entries.notes: BX21 records validation confirmed that the BarterSwap and Superposition names and barterswap.xyz domain are already consolidated under Barter entity hei_ex_000560. The candidate is terminally closed as duplicate.

BX21 records validation confirmed that swap.onbeam.com and the Beam Network Swap aliases are already canonical entity hei_ex_000558. The candidate is terminally closed as duplicate. Moonbeam Beamswap remains separate entity hei_ex_000370.
